name: dMY Technology Group, Inc. V
description: dMY Technology Group, Inc. V is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search for a target business in the consumer technology ecosystem, including consumer internet, e-commerce, gaming, entertainment, health and wellness, and enterprise software-as-a-service (SaaS) sectors.
